student_modification: Failure scenario (high noise) was chosen by me; code for adding noise and comparing accuracy was written with LLM help. I wrote the explanation linking to Task 1.2 assumptions and the suggested modification.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Implement a failure-mode experiment for shapelets.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Suggest a failure scenario for Logical-Shapelets (e.g. noise, many classes, short series) and write code to demonstrate it with a plot.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested noise as a failure mode; I implemented the low/high noise comparison and wrote the 5–7 sentence explanation and modification suggestion.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I linked the failure to Assumption 1 and 2 from Task 1.2 and verified the plot saves to results/.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Suggest a failure scenario for Logical-Shapelets (e.g. noise, many classes, short series) and write code to demonstrate it with a plot.
top_5_prompts.why_important: Basis for Task 3.2; I chose noise and wrote the full analysis.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that the failure mode and its explanation are mine; code was assisted by LLM and modified by me.
